roles.roleSummary: 奇鋐5月營收158.71億年增60.64%，累計805.41億年增90.31%。AI伺服器散熱需求強勁帶動爆發性成長。
products: 伺服器散熱模組（VC均熱板）
competitors: 其他散熱模組與液冷方案供應商
risks: 散熱競爭者眾（雙鴻/泰碩等）

evidence.publisher: 奇鋐科技 Asia Vital Components
evidence.title: Asia Vital Components official website
evidence.claim: Official site identifies AVC as a supplier of overall thermal solutions.

evidence.publisher: 公開資訊觀測站 MOPS / TWSE 財報書系統
evidence.title: 奇鋐科技股份有限公司 114 年度合併財務報告書
evidence.claim: Financial report confirms 114 revenue scale and main business scope covering electronic parts/materials, communication electronics and computer peripherals manufacturing/processing/trading.

techFocus: 液冷冷板銅微通道加工

roles.roleSummary: 奇鋐5月營收158.71億年增60.64%，累計805.41億年增90.31%。液冷散熱為AI伺服器核心瓶頸，需求爆發。
products: 液冷冷板（銅微通道Cold Plate）
competitors: 資料中心冷卻系統整合商

競爭者（雙鴻/泰碩）積極投入液冷市場

evidence.publisher: 奇鋐科技 Asia Vital Components
evidence.title: Asia Vital Components official website
evidence.claim: Official site positions AVC as an overall thermal solution supplier; liquid cooling remains marked as a topic-specific candidate until stronger product-page or investor-presentation evidence is collected.

evidence.publisher: 公開資訊觀測站 MOPS / TWSE 財報書系統
evidence.title: 奇鋐科技股份有限公司 114 年度合併財務報告書
evidence.claim: Financial report confirms electronics/computer-peripheral manufacturing scope but does not quantify liquid-cooling revenue contribution.
